stories.title: Follow live: Canada and Qatar face off in Group B ...
Brunson slams skeptics as Knicks revel in parade
stories.summary: Jalen Brunson finally hit back at his skeptics as the Knicks and millions of fans celebrated the franchise's first NBA championship in 53 years with a parade Thursday.

stories.title: Sources: MLB proposes amateur-entry overhaul
stories.summary: MLB's proposed changes include cutting amateur signing bonuses by more than $150M, making high school players ineligible for the draft and instituting an international draft.

stories.title: Pulisic still training solo a day before U.S. game...
stories.summary: United States men's national team star Christian Pulisic continued to train separately from the team on Thursday ahead of the U.S.'s World Cup game against Australia.

stories.title: Mitchell's seesaw round makes U.S. Open history
stories.summary: Keith Mitchell struggled mightily on his first nine holes at Shinnecock Hills on Thursday before rebounding in record fashion over the back half of his round at the U.S. Open.
